title: Block Catalog Entry
description: Schema for Arduino App Lab block catalog entries. Catalog files are authored as YAML; this JSON Schema validates the parsed data model.

id.description: Unique component identifier. Use kebab-case for external catalog entries (e.g. modulino-thermo). Built-in entries use snake_case (e.g. builtin_serial, cpp_math).

category.description: Toolbox category for this entry's blocks. Use '::' to create subcategories (e.g. 'I/O::Digital', 'Communication::Serial'). Single-level values (e.g. 'Modulino', 'Detection') produce flat categories. Each '::'-separated segment must be non-empty and free of leading/trailing whitespace.

description.description: Human-readable description of this catalog entry. Used in the community catalog browser. Accepts a plain string or a locale map {en: '...', it: '...'}. Keep it short (≤280 chars).

colour.description: Hex colour for this entry's toolbox category — 3-, 6-, or 8-digit (#rgb, #rrggbb, #rrggbbaa). Optional — if omitted, the category uses its default colour from the theme. When multiple entries define a colour for the same category, the last one loaded wins.

author.description: Name or handle of the catalog author (e.g. 'Arduino', 'Jane Doe'). Shown in the community catalog browser.

version.description: Version of this catalog entry. Accepts 1- to 3-part numeric versions with an optional 'v' prefix and SemVer pre-release/build suffix (e.g. '1.0.0', '2.1', 'v3', '1.0.0-beta.1'). Used to detect available updates in the community catalog browser.

docs.description: External documentation links. Keys are short lowercase labels (e.g. 'api', 'datasheet'); values are URLs.

runtime.description: Target runtime as <framework>:<language> (e.g. 'arduino:cpp'). Implementations with unsupported runtimes are silently ignored.

dependencies.description: Libraries, pip packages, or bricks required by this implementation.

targets.description: Optional list of supported targets or platforms. Accepts PlatformIO-style ids (e.g. 'espressif32', 'atmelavr', 'uno') and Arduino-style FQBN ids, which may contain uppercase, hyphens, or dots (e.g. 'arduino:avr', 'arduino:renesas_uno:unor4wifi', 'arduino:samd:mkr1000USB'). If absent, the block is considered universal.

codegen.description: Implementation-level codegen. Emitted once if any block from this implementation is used. Typical: shared imports, object construction, .begin() calls.

url.description: Git/VCS URL for libraries not in the PlatformIO registry. Emitted as PlatformIO's 'name=url' form; minVersion is ignored (pin via 'ref').

ref.description: Optional git tag/branch/commit to pin the VCS dependency (e.g. 'v1.0.0').

blockly.description: Verbatim Blockly JSON block definition. Passed directly to defineBlocksWithJsonArray() — the factory must not transform this. Any valid Blockly property is allowed.

type.description: Unique block type identifier. Convention: <component>_<action> in snake_case.

codegen.description: Declarative-tier code generation templates. Ignored if 'generator' is set.

generator.description: Imperative tier: name of a registered TypeScript class implementing IBlockCodeGenerator. Takes precedence over 'codegen' if both are present. First-party only — community catalog entries must not use this field.

BlockCodegen.description: Block-level code generation. Extends CodegenSections with body, precedence, and inputDefaults.

imports.description: #include or import lines. Deduplicated by resolved value.

declarations.description: Global/module-level declarations. Deduplicated by resolved value.

setup.description: One-shot init code (runs in setup() for C++, before def loop() for Python). Deduplicated.

helpers.description: Utility functions. Key = function name (dedup key), value = function body. Use {{FUNCTION_NAME}} in the value.

body.description: Inline code lines, joined with newline. Optional for setup-only blocks.

precedence.description: Operator precedence. Required for value blocks (blockly.output is set).

inputDefaults.description: Fallback values for unconnected value inputs.

CodegenSections.description: Code generation sections. All string values support {{placeholder}} syntax. Sections route through generator.definitions_ using conventional key prefixes (import_*, decl_*, setup_*, func_*).

imports.description: #include or import lines. Deduplicated by resolved value.

declarations.description: Global/module-level declarations. Deduplicated by resolved value.

setup.description: One-shot init code (runs in setup() for C++, before def loop() for Python). Deduplicated.

helpers.description: Utility functions. Key = function name (dedup key), value = function body. Use {{FUNCTION_NAME}} in the value.
